summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling; ordinary open PRs are kept as independent or related work with their current blockers preserved.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR; no close or merge action is allowed in this plan job.
Standalone docs improvement; keep open for maintainer review.
Useful candidate fix for a hydrated issue, but merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Exact item is security-sensitive per preflight; quarantine this PR only and continue unrelated classifications.
Exact item is security-sensitive per preflight; no Clownfish close, merge, label, or fix action.
Related candidate fix, but proof/review blockers prevent merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Related useful PR, but not a closure or merge candidate in this plan-only inventory shard.
Clear related work with unresolved review/author blockers; keep open and do not escalate the whole cluster.
Related to a security-sensitive historical issue but not itself route-only in the preflight; keep open without mutation.
Although the compact matrix marks security_sensitive false, the item itself describes credential-bearing URL exposure; false-positive scoped quarantine is safer than Clownfish backlog cleanup.
